description: Animates translating the ruler to a new position on the graph
utility: Reposition the ruler before drawing the next line or marking a point

arguments.name: newPosition
arguments.description: The new position to move the ruler to

examples.scenario: Move ruler to (4,3) then draw a line
examples.expression: G = g2d(-10, 10, -10, 10); rulermove(G, point(G, 4, 3)); rulerline(G, point(G, 4, 3), point(G, 8, 6))
